name: Mushroom Spread with Lemon and Thyme
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Fresh thyme leaves OR 3/4 teaspoon Dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-low heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms, thyme (fresh or dried), and lemon peel to the skillet and stir.
4. Cover and cook until mushrooms are tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Uncover and increase the heat to high. Cook until mushrooms begin to brown, about 6 minutes.
6. Cool slightly. Transfer the mushroom mixture to a food processor.
7. Add cheese, lemon juice, remaining 1/2 tablespoon oil, and finely chop (using on/off turns).
8. Mix in parsley; season with salt and pepper.
9. Transfer the mixture to a small bowl. (Can be made up to 3 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.)
10. Serve with toasted bread rounds.
Makes about 1-1/2 cups.
Per 2-tablespoon serving: calories, 30; fat, 2 g; sodium, 17 mg; cholesterol, 1 mg.
